content.json:
# AVS Monitoring Workbook (No Log Analytics Required)

Full-coverage Azure VMware Solution monitoring using **only free data sources**: Azure Resource Graph, Azure Monitor platform metrics API (93-day retention), Azure Alerts Management, and ARM REST endpoints. No Log Analytics Workspace, no diagnostic settings, no ingestion costs.

**All supported AVS platform metrics are charted** ([reference](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/reference/supported-metrics/microsoft-avs-privateclouds-metrics)).

parameters.name: Subscription
parameters.query:
where type =~ 'microsoft.avs/privateclouds'
| summarize Count = count() by subscriptionId
| order by Count desc
| project value = subscriptionId, label = subscriptionId, selected = true

parameters.name: AVSInstance
parameters.label: AVS Instance
parameters.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.avs/privateclouds'
| project value = id, label = name

content.json:
## Overview
At-a-glance health of your AVS estate. Resource Graph + Alerts Management + free metrics API.

content.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.avs/privateclouds'
| where id in ({AVSInstance})
| count
| project Label = 'Private Clouds', Value = Count
content.title: Private Clouds

content.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.avs/privateclouds/clusters' or (type =~ 'microsoft.avs/privateclouds' and id in ({AVSInstance}))
| extend clusterSize = iff(type =~ 'microsoft.avs/privateclouds', toint(properties.managementCluster.clusterSize), toint(properties.clusterSize))
| summarize TotalHosts = sum(clusterSize)
| project Label = 'Hosts', Value = TotalHosts
content.title: Hosts

content.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.avs/privateclouds/clusters' or (type =~ 'microsoft.avs/privateclouds' and id in ({AVSInstance}))
| count
| project Label = 'Clusters', Value = Count
content.title: Clusters

content.query:
alertsmanagementresources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.alertsmanagement/alerts'
| where properties.essentials.targetResourceType =~ 'microsoft.avs/privateclouds'
| where properties.essentials.alertState in~ ('New', 'Acknowledged')
| count
| project Label = 'Active Alerts', Value = Count
content.title: Active Alerts

content.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.avs/privateclouds'
| where id in ({AVSInstance})
| extend provisioningState = tostring(properties.provisioningState)
| extend internet = tostring(properties.internet)
| extend availability = tostring(properties.availability.strategy)
| extend skuName = tostring(sku.name)
| extend clusterSize = toint(properties.managementCluster.clusterSize)
| extend hasCircuit = iff(isnotempty(tostring(properties.circuit.expressRoutePrivatePeeringId)), 'Connected', 'Not Connected')
| project name, resourceGroup, location, provisioningState, skuName, clusterSize, internet, availability, hasCircuit
content.title: Private Cloud Health Status
content.noDataMessage: No AVS Private Clouds found in selected subscription(s)

content.json:
## CPU Metrics
All supported AVS CPU metrics from the Azure Monitor metrics API. Both legacy (`EffectiveCpuAverage`) and new (`CpuUsageAverage`) namespace metrics included.

## Memory Metrics
All supported AVS memory metrics from the Azure Monitor metrics API including both legacy (`UsageAverage`, `EffectiveMemAverage`, `OverheadAverage`, `TotalMbAverage`) and new (`MemUsageAverage`, `ClusterSummaryEffectiveMemory`, `MemOverheadAverage`, `ClusterSummaryTotalMemCapacityMB`) namespace metrics.

## Storage Metrics & Datastores
All supported AVS datastore metrics: `DiskUsedPercentage`, `DiskUsedLatest`, `DiskCapacityLatest` (new namespace) and `UsedLatest`, `CapacityLatest` (legacy). Plus external datastore inventory (ANF, Elastic SAN, Pure).

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.avs/privateclouds'
| where id in ({AVSInstance})
| extend sku = tostring(sku.name)
| extend hostCount = toint(properties.managementCluster.clusterSize)
| extend vsanRawTB = round(hostCount * 15.4, 1)
| extend vsanUsableTB = round(vsanRawTB * 0.7, 1)
| extend vcenter = tostring(properties.endpoints.vcsa)
| extend nsxt = tostring(properties.endpoints.nsxtManager)
| project name, sku, hostCount, vsanRawTB, vsanUsableTB, vcenter, nsxt
content.title: vSAN Capacity Estimate (per Private Cloud)

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.avs/privateclouds/clusters/datastores'
| extend pcName = tostring(split(id, '/')[8])
| extend clusterName = tostring(split(id, '/')[10])
| extend netAppVolume = tostring(properties.netAppVolume.id)
| extend elasticSanVolume = tostring(properties.elasticSanVolume.targetIqn)
| extend datastoreType = case(isnotempty(netAppVolume), 'ANF', isnotempty(elasticSanVolume), 'Elastic SAN', 'Pure Storage')
| extend status = tostring(properties.status)
| extend provisioningState = tostring(properties.provisioningState)
| project name, pcName, clusterName, datastoreType, status, provisioningState, resourceGroup
content.title: External Datastores (ANF / Elastic SAN / Pure)

content.json:
## Networking
ExpressRoute circuits, GlobalReach connections, and ExpressRoute authorizations from Azure Resource Graph.

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.avs/privateclouds'
| where id in ({AVSInstance})
| extend circuit = properties.circuit
| extend expressRouteID = tostring(circuit.expressRouteID)
| extend expressRoutePrivatePeeringID = tostring(circuit.expressRoutePrivatePeeringID)
| extend primarySubnet = tostring(circuit.primarySubnet)
| extend secondarySubnet = tostring(circuit.secondarySubnet)
| project name, location, expressRouteID, primarySubnet, secondarySubnet, subscriptionId
content.title: ExpressRoute Circuit Information

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.avs/privateclouds/globalreachconnections'
| extend pcName = tostring(split(id, '/')[8])
| extend connectionStatus = tostring(properties.circuitConnectionStatus)
| extend peerExpressRouteCircuit = tostring(properties.peerExpressRouteCircuit)
| extend addressPrefix = tostring(properties.addressPrefix)
| extend provisioningState = tostring(properties.provisioningState)
| project name, pcName, connectionStatus, peerExpressRouteCircuit, addressPrefix, provisioningState, resourceGroup
content.title: GlobalReach Connections

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.avs/privateclouds/authorizations'
| extend pcName = tostring(split(id, '/')[8])
| extend expressRouteAuthorizationId = tostring(properties.expressRouteAuthorizationId)
| extend provisioningState = tostring(properties.provisioningState)
| project name, pcName, provisioningState, expressRouteAuthorizationId, resourceGroup
content.title: ExpressRoute Authorizations

content.json:
## Arc-enabled VMware vSphere Resources
Requires [Azure Arc-enabled VMware vSphere](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-arc/vmware-vsphere/overview). For AVS, see [Deploy Arc-enabled VMware vSphere for AVS](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-vmware/deploy-arc-for-azure-vmware-solution).

content.query:
resources
| where type contains 'microsoft.connectedvmwarevsphere' and type !contains 'virtualmachines' and type !contains 'virtualnetworks' and type !contains 'virtualmachinetemplates'
| extend resource = tolower(tostring(split(type, '/')[1]))
| summarize count() by resource
content.noDataMessage: No Arc-enabled VMware vSphere resources found

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.connectedvmwarevsphere/virtualmachines'
| extend osType = tostring(properties.osProfile.osType)
| summarize count() by osType
content.title: VMs by OS Type

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.connectedvmwarevsphere/virtualmachines'
| extend guestAgentStatus = tostring(properties.guestAgentProfile.status)
| summarize GuestManaged = countif(guestAgentStatus == 'Connected'), NotManaged = countif(guestAgentStatus != 'Connected' or isempty(guestAgentStatus))
| project Connected = GuestManaged, ['Not Connected'] = NotManaged
content.title: Guest Management Status

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.connectedvmwarevsphere/virtualmachines'
| extend osType = tostring(properties.osProfile.osType)
| extend osName = tostring(properties.osProfile.osName)
| extend toolsRunningStatus = tostring(properties.osProfile.toolsRunningStatus)
| extend toolsVersion = toint(properties.osProfile.toolsVersion)
| extend cores = toint(properties.hardwareProfile.numCoresPerSocket)
| extend mem = toint(properties.hardwareProfile.memorySizeMB)
| extend CPUs = toint(properties.hardwareProfile.numCPUs)
| extend Power = tostring(properties.powerState)
| extend guestAgentStatus = tostring(properties.guestAgentProfile.status)
| project name, osType, osName, CPUs, cores, mem, Power, toolsRunningStatus, guestAgentStatus, resourceGroup
content.title: Arc-Enabled VM Inventory

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.connectedvmwarevsphere/virtualmachines/extensions' or type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
| extend vmId = tostring(split(id, '/extensions')[0])
| extend extensionType = tostring(properties.type)
| extend provisioningState = tostring(properties.provisioningState)
| extend publisher = tostring(properties.publisher)
| project name, vmId, extensionType, publisher, provisioningState, resourceGroup
content.title: Azure Extensions on Arc-Enabled VMs
content.noDataMessage: No Azure extensions deployed on Arc-enabled VMs

content.json:
## Capacity & Inventory
Cluster inventory, SKU breakdown, and host distribution from Azure Resource Graph.

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.avs/privateclouds' or type == 'microsoft.avs/privateclouds/clusters'
| extend pcName = iff(type == 'microsoft.avs/privateclouds', name, tostring(split(id, '/')[8]))
| extend clusterName = iff(type == 'microsoft.avs/privateclouds', 'Management', name)
| extend clusterSize = iff(type == 'microsoft.avs/privateclouds', toint(properties.managementCluster.clusterSize), toint(properties.clusterSize))
| extend skuName = tostring(sku.name)
| project pcName, clusterName, clusterSize, skuName, location, resourceGroup
content.title: Cluster Inventory

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.avs/privateclouds'
| where id in ({AVSInstance})
| extend skuName = tostring(sku.name)
| extend hostCount = toint(properties.managementCluster.clusterSize)
| summarize Hosts = sum(hostCount), Clouds = count() by skuName
| order by Hosts desc
content.title: SKU Distribution (Hosts)

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.avs/privateclouds'
| where id in ({AVSInstance})
| extend hostCount = toint(properties.managementCluster.clusterSize)
| summarize Hosts = sum(hostCount) by location
| order by Hosts desc
content.title: Hosts by Region

content.json:
## Alerts & Advisor
Active AVS alerts (Azure Alerts Management) and Azure Advisor recommendations. Both free.

content.query:
alertsmanagementresources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.alertsmanagement/alerts'
| where (id contains 'microsoft.avs/privatecloud') or properties.essentials.targetResourceType =~ 'microsoft.avs/privateclouds'
| extend Severity = tostring(properties.essentials.severity)
| summarize Count = count() by Severity
| extend Label = case(Severity == 'Sev0', 'Critical', Severity == 'Sev1', 'Error', Severity == 'Sev2', 'Warning', Severity == 'Sev3', 'Informational', Severity == 'Sev4', 'Verbose', Severity)
| extend SortOrder = case(Severity == 'Sev0', 0, Severity == 'Sev1', 1, Severity == 'Sev2', 2, Severity == 'Sev3', 3, 4)
| sort by SortOrder asc
| project Label, Count
content.title: Alerts by Severity

content.query:
alertsmanagementresources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.alertsmanagement/alerts'
| where (id contains 'microsoft.avs/privatecloud') or properties.essentials.targetResourceType =~ 'microsoft.avs/privateclouds'
| extend FireTime = todatetime(properties.essentials.startDateTime)
| extend Severity = tostring(properties.essentials.severity)
| extend AlertName = tostring(properties.essentials.alertRule)
| extend AlertState = tostring(properties.essentials.alertState)
| extend MonitorCondition = tostring(properties.essentials.monitorCondition)
| extend TargetResource = tostring(properties.essentials.targetResourceName)
| where FireTime {TimeRange}
| project FireTime, Severity, AlertName, TargetResource, AlertState, MonitorCondition
| order by FireTime desc
content.title: Alerts in Selected Time Range
content.noDataMessage: No alerts in the selected time range

content.query:
AdvisorResources
| where type == 'microsoft.advisor/recommendations'
| where properties.impactedField contains 'microsoft.avs' or tolower(tostring(properties.resourceMetadata)) contains 'vmware'
| extend Solution = tostring(properties.shortDescription.solution)
| extend Category = tostring(properties.category)
| extend Impact = tostring(properties.impact)
| extend LastUpdated = tostring(properties.lastUpdated)
| extend Resource = tostring(properties.impactedValue)
| project Resource, resourceGroup, Solution, Category, Impact, LastUpdated, subscriptionId
content.title: Azure Advisor Recommendations for AVS
content.noDataMessage: No Advisor recommendations for AVS resources

content.json:
## AVS Map
Geographic distribution of your AVS Private Cloud instances.

content.query:
where type == 'microsoft.avs/privateclouds'
| where id in ({AVSInstance})
| summarize count() by location
content.title: AVS Instance Locations
